short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal diverts US focus
rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality; Iran deal uncertainty and Israeli strikes on Beirut keep US attention divided, which is a persistent concern for Ukrainian aid flows.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — ongoing active combat
top_events.summary: War continues at maximum intensity with no ceasefire or qualitative shift. Daily life in Ukraine remains defined by strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal signing disputed — US attention remains divided
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on a US-Iran deal mean Washington's diplomatic bandwidth stays split, potentially delaying focus on Ukraine aid and military support packages.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut on day of expected Iran deal signing
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Beirut complicate US-Iran negotiations, adding uncertainty about whether a deal — and the US attention shift it implies — will materialize soon.
